title: Header Appearance on Interaction
description: Captures whether the entire header bar changes appearance (background, shadow, border) when hovering nav items or when a megamenu/panel is open. headerBackgroundBehavior is REQUIRED — documents transparent vs solid behavior for pre-implementation CSS template selection. Source and migrated both capture; compare-header-appearance.js compares.

headerBackgroundBehavior.description: REQUIRED. Documents header background behavior for pre-implementation gate. When defaultState is transparent, CSS must NOT add background-color on .nav-wrapper; use transparent header template.

defaultState.description: Header background when no interaction. transparent = no solid background (hero overlap); solid = opaque; gradient = gradient overlay.

interactionState.description: Header background when nav hovered or panel open.

hasChanges.description: True if header bar appearance changes on hover/click of nav items or when panel is open

triggers.description: What interactions cause header appearance to change
